title: Arcs, circle, and irregular bands (wobbly flowing bands)
restrictions: USER-PICKED, and built under the user's R20 note: the geometric shapes (clean circles/arcs) are rejected — 'replace with a wobbly or gradient-like feel.' So #915 is rendered WOBBLY: flowing IRREGULAR BANDS (the organic heart of the instruction) as curtain-like wavy lines, with the 'arcs' and 'circle' DISSOLVED into the wandering flow rather than drawn as figures. Generator = `sheets` (displaced grid columns interpolated into flowing wavy lines) — organic, no legible geometry. Monochrome black on white; hand-made wobble throughout; density kept open (paper-rip limit). The 16 span wobble amount (gentle -> wild), band count (sparse bold -> fine dense), wave smoothness (rows), and airiness (interpolation).
